description: Whether the provider supports custom filenames (beyond the canonical filename convention).

amp.mechanism: not observed — amp requires SKILL.md as the fixed canonical filename

claude-code.mechanism: Variable directory name: .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md — directory name is the skill identifier

cline.mechanism: Not applicable — Cline uses fixed SKILL.md canonical filename only

copilot-cli.mechanism: not observed — Agent Skills standard uses fixed SKILL.md filename

gemini-cli.mechanism: not observed — filename is fixed as SKILL.md
